meta.title: Zynape — Intelligence. Engineered.
meta.description: Zynape builds intelligent systems, cloud infrastructure, and adaptive software for ambitious teams. Intelligence. Engineered.
meta.ogDescription: A robot-guided journey through six engineering domains.

robotMessages.home: Hi — I'm your guide. Scroll to explore.
robotMessages.solutions: Six domains. Pick one to dive in.
robotMessages.operations: Cloud · SOC · NOC — operations that never sleep.
robotMessages.service: Here's how we work. Scroll horizontally →

solRobotMessages.solHero: Welcome to Solutions — your full-stack journey starts here.
solRobotMessages.solMigration: From on-prem iron to cloud-native. Let's migrate.
solRobotMessages.solOpsSolar: DevOps · ITOps · SecOps · FinOps — orbiting one intelligence core.
solRobotMessages.solAgentic: Voice received. Your intent is already being orchestrated across systems.
solRobotMessages.solAi: Intelligent pipelines, agentic systems, LLMOps — AI that ships.
solRobotMessages.solSoc: 24/7 eyes on your perimeter. Threats caught before they breach.

home.sub: We design and ship adaptive systems — from autonomous AI pipelines to cloud-native platforms — for teams that refuse to ship ordinary products.

solutions.title: Six domains. One studio.
solutions.lede: Pick a discipline. Open it. Each card unfolds into its own world — a deep dive into how we approach the work.

domains.title: AI & Automation
domains.desc: Intelligent systems that learn, decide, and adapt at production scale.

detail.title: Engines that think.
detail.lede: From retrieval-augmented assistants to autonomous decision pipelines, we ship AI that is observable, evaluable, and safe.
list: RAG & agentic systems with tool use
Vector indexes, hybrid retrieval, model routing

domains.title: Cloud Infrastructure
domains.desc: Resilient, multi-region platforms with infrastructure-as-code from day one.

detail.title: Platforms that don't blink.
detail.lede: Multi-cloud, multi-region, multi-team. We build the platform substrate before the product team needs to ask.

domains.title: Cybersecurity
domains.desc: Threat modeling, zero-trust architecture, and continuous security posture.

detail.title: Defense in depth.
detail.lede: Zero-trust by default. Your perimeter is identity, your traffic is encrypted, your secrets are short-lived.

domains.title: Web Platforms
domains.desc: Edge-first architectures with type-safe end-to-end stacks.

detail.title: Web that moves.
detail.lede: Performance budgets enforced in CI. Accessibility audits per release. The kind of frontend that hits 100 across the board.

domains.title: Data Analytics
domains.desc: Pipelines, warehouses, and dashboards that decision-makers actually read.

detail.title: Numbers that narrate.
detail.lede: From event capture to executive dashboards. We treat the data layer as a product, not a side-effect.

domains.title: Product Design
domains.desc: Research-led product design that ships with the engineering team, not after.

detail.title: Designed to be used.
detail.lede: Discovery sprints, prototypes that are real code, and design systems that are a single source of truth.

operations.title: Always-on. Always watching.
operations.lede: Three command centers behind every Zynape platform — engineered to monitor, defend, and scale before you ever notice a wobble.

panels.title: Multi-region compute fabric.
panels.lede: Active-active deployments across regions, hot failover, infra-as-code from line one — capacity scales before your traffic does.

panels.title: Threats caught before they breach.
panels.lede: 24/7 detection, response, and forensic trail. We harden the perimeter, watch the inside, and rehearse the worst day.

panels.title: Routes that self-heal.
panels.lede: Edge-to-edge visibility, BGP route shaping, and predictive failure detection — your network reroutes before a packet drops.

service.title: How we work.
service.lede: Five movements. One arc. Each card flips to reveal what we actually do inside — hover any step to see.

steps.title: Discover
steps.text: We embed with stakeholders, map jobs-to-be-done, and identify the hottest constraints to break first.

steps.title: Design
steps.text: High-fidelity prototypes that engineers can pull tokens from. No throwaway artifacts.

steps.title: Build
steps.text: Trunk-based, type-safe, observable. We ship in week one and keep shipping.

steps.title: Validate
steps.text: A/B tests, eval suites, real-user monitoring. We don't celebrate launches — we celebrate impact.

steps.title: Scale
steps.text: Hand-off, training, and runbooks. Or stay on retainer — we're flexible.

contact.heading: Start a conversation.
contact.lede: Tell us what you're building. We answer every message inside one business day.
contact.successText: Thanks — message received. We'll reply shortly.

fields.name: Your name
fields.message: What would you like to build?
